{{Quote|The bonus from the NRI would be enough to fund the expedition to Stovax. But if we wait until Penga Rift arrives, we'll have to share the bonus. We might even end up being cut out completely.|Kroddok Stopa about the expedition to Stovax|<ref name="Shield of Lies">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref>}}
'''Stovax''' was a planet located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] that the [[Obroan Institute for Archaeology|Obroan Institute]] and [[Kroddok Stopa]] intended to excavate.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
